vocab.meaning: những con đường mòn ít người qua lại
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to the unbeaten track in the northern mountains, far away from the typical tourist hotspots.

vocab.meaning: những tầm nhìn đẹp đến ngộp thở
vocab.example: Hiking along the Swiss Alps would provide vistas of breathtaking beauty at every turn of the trail.

vocab.meaning: sự tĩnh mịch, trạng thái một mình yên bình
vocab.example: I crave the absolute solitude of a deserted beach where I can hear nothing but the rhythmic lapping of the waves.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đồng quê hữu tình
vocab.example: I’d love to traverse a pastoral landscape filled with grazing sheep and ancient stone walls in the English Cotswolds.

vocab.meaning: bao phủ trong sương mù (tạo cảm giác huyền bí)
vocab.example: Walking through a cedar forest shrouded in mist would feel like stepping into a scene from a mythological tale.

vocab.meaning: khám phá đô thị (thường là những khu vực cũ, ngõ ngách)
vocab.example: For me, urban exploration in the labyrinthine alleys of an old city is just as rewarding as a nature hike.

vocab.meaning: đi băng qua, đi ngang qua (một khu vực rộng lớn)
vocab.example: If I had the stamina, I would love to traverse the entire length of the coastal path in Vietnam.
Reaching the summit after a long walk rewards you with panoramic views of the city sprawling beneath.

vocab.meaning: vùng sông nước yên tĩnh/hẻo lánh
vocab.example: I’ve always fancied a long stroll along the tranquil backwaters of the Mekong Delta to observe the local way of life.
My dream is to spend a day wandering through a pristine wilderness, untouched by modern industrialization.
